labels: enhancement

## What's the use case

<!-- Describe the student, developer, or maintainer problem this solves.
     Start with the user, not the feature. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What would this look like in the library, the renderer, or the skill? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about, and why is the proposed change better? -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within the existing 5 widget types, OR
- [ ] This is a new widget type (see CONTRIBUTING.md for the process)
- [ ] This doesn't require hosted infrastructure (Phase 2+ is out of scope for this repo)
